final:
module four_bit_counter (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] count
);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      count <= count - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
